operator_instances.rationale: Real-world mass spec data often includes blank lines or extra spaces. Adding this requirement tests the function's robustness in parsing input data.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: The function must correctly handle the case when the input m/z string is empty (i.e., contains no m/z values). In such case, it should return 0 without making an API request.
operator_instances.rationale: Edge-case handling is critical for robust code. An empty input should be handled gracefully to avoid unnecessary API calls or errors.
